name: Exousia Bio, Inc.
business: Exousia Bio, Inc. (LMMY) is a startup developing an educational platform and video game marketed as 'twoplus1' that teaches financial knowledge and resource management to children. The company generates revenue through subscription fees and commissions on virtual property trades within the game. It has trademark protection for 'twoplus1' in the United Kingdom and is in the process of doing the same in other key regions.

exposures.sentence: We are a startup developing a business taping the eLearning market and the gaming market by teaching financial knowledge and resource management to children.
